cart.title: Cart
cart.addBillingAddressPrompt: Please add a billing address to continue your purchase.
cart.howToPay: How do you want to pay?
cart.addCardPrompt: To add a credit card, please click on the Add New Card button.
cart.paymentActivationPrompt: Please make the payment for service activation. When payment is received, your service will be immediately activated.
cart.bankPaymentNote: After payment is made, open a support ticket with the transaction ID, date, and amount paid. We will manually credit the payment.

creditCard.name: Name
creditCard.verifyIntroStep1: Verification is needed before your credit card is available for use. InterServer will charge your credit card with two amounts under $1.00 each.
creditCard.verifyBillingStatement: These charges will show up on your billing statement within a couple of minutes, usually under pending transactions. If you do not see these charges, please contact your credit card issuer for more details.
creditCard.verifyVoidNotice: These authorization charges are only for verification purposes and will be voided within 3-5 days, depending on your bank.
creditCard.acceptTempCharges: I accept two temporary charges under $1.00 each.
creditCard.verifyBankLogin: Log in to your credit card's online banking or call your bank to verify the two amounts charged. They often show under Pending Charges with your bank. These authorization charges will disappear in about 3-5 days depending on your bank.
creditCard.enterAmountsPrompt: Please enter the two amounts charged to your credit card. The values must be in USD.
creditCard.currencyNote: Please note that the charges on your credit card statement may be in a different currency from the one required on the last confirmation page described above. If your credit card statement does not display the original transaction amounts in the required currency, you will have to contact your credit card company. They should be able to tell you the amounts of the two charges in the original currency.
creditCard.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove your credit card {card}?
creditCard.verifiedTooltip: This card has been authenticated and enabled for use in our system.
creditCard.enableCardTooltip: Click here to enable this credit card for use.

paymentSuccess.title: Payment Success
paymentSuccess.thankYou: Thank you for your payment. Your transaction has been completed successfully.

paymentTypes.title: Payment Types
paymentTypes.ccNote: All credit cards must be verified before they can be used. To verify them, click the "Verify" button.
paymentTypes.deleteInvoiceConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your invoice {id}?

prepays.title: PrePaid Funds
prepays.showingPage: Showing page {page} of {totalPages} and {records} records out of {totalRecords}
prepays.deletePrepayConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your prepay #{id} and its related history?
